personality_one_liner: A cinematic, premium dark-fantasy RPG interface where medical education feels like decoding ancient, high-stakes lore.

spacing.rule: Generous cinematic pacing. Use lg (16) to xl (24) for macro layout. Cramped screens ruin the premium game feel. Ensure comfortable safe-area clearance and thumb-zones.

do's: Use heavy glassmorphism for battle screen clue cards, floating action buttons, and modal overlays.
Use tinted translucent bases (e.g., brandTertiary or element colors) paired with expo-blur.
Make bottom tab bars and sticky headers frosted.
dont's: Don't blur dense Codex body text areas or stat readouts.
Avoid stacking more than two glass surfaces to maintain high frame rate.
Never place thin serif typography directly on noisy background imagery without a heavy scrim.

screens.name: Run (Home)
screens.purpose: The daily roguelite shift hub where players select encounters and view their kingdom progress.

states.loading: Centered glowing gold elemental emblem spinner.
states.empty: Awaiting Shift: 'No encounters logged today.' with 'Start Shift' primary CTA.
states.error: Torn parchment visual: 'The realm's connection severed.' + Retry button.

screens.layout: Cinematic vertical scroll. Top: Safe-area clearing frosted header with Player Rank and current Kingdom health. Middle: A full-bleed hero card (using forest bg) representing the next encounter/boss with a dark vertical scrim and Antique Gold CTA ('Enter the Shift'). Bottom: Horizontal scroll of smaller cards for past encounters/rewards.

screens.name: Battle (Encounter)
screens.purpose: The heart of the game: tactical, clue-based medical combat screen against disease corruptions.

states.loading: Dark screen fading into the encounter area.
states.error: Connection drop message with tactile 'Reconnect' button.

screens.layout: Portrait mobile layout divided into Top-Middle-Bottom. TOP (Future): Enemy sprite/boss avatar center-aligned with a large, glowing Stability (health) meter and intent icon. MIDDLE (Present): The 3 active Healer Heroes arranged in a slight arc (Hero Corner concept) with their element icons. BOTTOM (Past/Action): The player's Hand containing 3-5 Clue Cards fanned horizontally. These cards must have large touch targets (thumb-friendly). A fixed 'floating' Action bar sits above the cards with 'Stabilize/Assess' buttons. Heavy use of glassmorphism on the clue cards.

screens.name: Heroes (Roster)
screens.purpose: Collect and upgrade healer heroes, inspecting their rarity and skills.

states.loading: Skeleton grid of hero portrait cards.
states.empty: 'Your Hall of Heroes is empty. Recruit your first Healer.' + Summon CTA.

screens.layout: Genshin-inspired high-definition grid. 2-column card layout (flexWrap, space-between). Each hero card features a dark-tinted image background, element-colored border, and their Rarity Stars (3 to 7) overlapping the bottom edge. Tapping a hero opens a full-screen sheet with large Cormorant Garamond typography and glass status panels.

screens.name: Codex (Library)
screens.purpose: The educational payoff: deep-dive unlocked lore on diseases, body systems, and pharmacology.

states.empty: 'The library awaits new discoveries. Defeat corruptions to unlock lore.'

screens.layout: Editorial-style layout mixed with Luxe Dark. Large serif headers (Cormorant Garamond). Section headers feature subtle Antique Gold gradient bands. Content is arranged in stacked horizontal list items with a left-aligned elemental icon block. Text must be perfectly legible (Satoshi 16pt body, 1.5x line height) over solid surfaceSecondary, avoiding noisy backgrounds for reading clarity.

screens.name: Kingdom
screens.purpose: Base building and clinical progression hub.

states.empty: 'The Kingdom is in ruins. Begin your first shift.'
states.error: 'Failed to survey the Kingdom.' + Retry button.

screens.layout: Full-bleed background image of the castle under mist. Heavy vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surface at bottom). Building nodes (Academy, Library, Apothecary) sit as floating frosted glass cards spaced asymmetrically. Clicking a node opens a bottom sheet to upgrade or manage.

kingdom_bg.alt: A castle shrouded in mist, surrounded by dense forest under a moody dark sky

encounter_forest_bg.alt: Ethereal misty forest scene evoking a fantasy RPG encounter area

codex_parchment_bg.alt: Open ancient spell book depicting mystical illustrations and enchantments

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Follow the 6 Glass / Luxe DARK personality strictly. The UI must feel like a premium cinematic RPG (Genshin / Slay the Spire), not a clinical quiz app.

BATTLE SCREEN COMPOSITION: Use a Top-Middle-Bottom portrait hierarchy. Top = Enemy and Stability Meter. Middle = Player's Hero team (curved/arc setup). Bottom = Clue Cards (large touch targets, fanned or stacked) and Action Buttons. Ensure cards don't occlude the enemy sprite.

COLOR ENFORCEMENT: Never use Blues, Indigo, Purple, Orange, or Terracotta. Rely exclusively on the provided Gold (brand), Crimson, Mint, Emerald, Amber, and Silver palette tokens (defined as element_air, element_fire, etc. in the JSON).

TYPOGRAPHY HIERARCHY: Use Cormorant Garamond exclusively for dramatic titles, hero names, and spell/disease names. Use Satoshi for all body text, stats, and clue card descriptions. Weight must NEVER exceed 500.

GLASS & SCRIMS: Use expo-blur paired with translucent dark overlays for cards. Any text sitting on the background images (Kingdom, Encounter Forest) MUST have a heavy vertical gradient scrim (transparent to ≥70% surfaceInverse or surface) to guarantee WCAG contrast.

ELEMENTAL TYPING: Apply the specific element colors (e.g., element_fire for Infection, element_river for Cardiovascular) to badges, borders, and subtle glows around heroes or clue cards to immediately visually communicate the system without reading.
